column3:
**Savory Oat‑Egg Muffins**
• ½ cup gluten‑free rolled oats, 1 egg, ¼ cup lactose‑free milk (almond/soy), 1 tbsp chopped chives, pinch of smoked paprika, ½ tsp olive oil. Blend, pour into a muffin tin, bake 15 min @ 180 °C. 2 muffins + a small orange.
column4:
**Mexican‑Style Chicken & Rice**
• 120 g skinless chicken thigh, diced
• ½ cup cooked brown rice
• ½ cup black beans (rinsed)
• ¼ cup corn kernels
• 1 tsp cumin, ½ tsp chili powder, lime juice, cilantro. Cook chicken in 1 tsp oil, add spices, combine with rice/beans/corn.
column5:
**Thai‑Green Curry Beef**
• 150 g lean beef strips
• 1 cup frozen mixed Asian veg (no onion)
• 1 cup coconut milk (light)
• 1 tbsp green curry paste (check for gluten)
• ½ cup jasmine rice. Simmer beef & veg in curry sauce, serve over rice.

column3:
**Potato‑Spinach Frittata**
• 1 medium boiled potato, sliced
• 2 eggs
• ½ cup fresh spinach
• 1 tsp olive oil, pinch of nutmeg. Layer potato & spinach in a skillet, pour beaten eggs, cook 8 min, finish under grill.
column4:
**Indian‑Style Lentil & Veg Stew**
• ½ cup red lentils
• 1 cup diced carrots & peas (frozen)
• 1 tbsp curry powder, ½ tsp turmeric, 1 tbsp coconut oil. Cook lentils & veg with spices in water, finish with coconut oil.
column5:
**Grilled Salmon with Roasted Potatoes**
• 150 g salmon fillet
• 1 medium sweet potato, cubed
• 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp dill, lemon wedges. Season salmon, bake with sweet potatoes @ 200 °C for 20 min.

column3:
**Greek Yogurt Parfait**
• 1 cup lactose‑free Greek yogurt
• ½ cup gluten‑free granola
• ½ cup mixed berries. Layer in a glass.
column4:
**Turkey & Avocado Wrap**
• 100 g sliced turkey breast
• 1 small avocado, mashed
• lettuce leaves, gluten‑free wrap. Fill wrap with turkey, avocado, lettuce.
column5:
**Beef & Veggie Stir‑Fry**
• 150 g beef strips
• 1 cup mixed stir‑fry veg (no onion)
• 1 tbsp gluten‑free soy sauce, 1 tbsp olive oil. Stir‑fry beef & veg in sauce. Serve over rice or quinoa.

column3:
**Chia Seed Pudding**
• 2 tbsp chia seeds, ½ cup lactose‑free milk (almond/soy), 1 tsp maple syrup, ½ tsp vanilla extract. Mix, refrigerate overnight. Top with sliced banana.
column4:
**Caprese Salad**
• 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
• 1 small mozzarella ball, diced
• fresh basil",scaffold_GPT-OSS-120B,GPT-OSS-120B,gpt-3.5-turbo
